description: Camorra organization formed in the late 1970s in Campania, Italy, to counter Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata. It united various clans such as Giuliano, Vollaro, Licciardi, and Mallardo. After Cutolo's fall, internal feuds erupted, notably between the Nuvoletta and Bardellino clans. The organization was active primarily in the 1970s and 1980s.
